# experiments.admixture_experiment { #tslai.experiments.admixture_experiment }

```python
tslai.experiments.admixture_experiment(
    T_admix=30.0,
    n_admix=6,
    n_ref=8,
    sequence_length=200000.0,
    recombination_rate=1e-08,
    Ne=1000,
    T_split=5000.0,
    f_A=0.3,
    seed=1,
    max_iter=8,
    Q0=None,
    infer=False,
    mutation_rate=5e-08,
)
```

Simulate admixture, fit hard-clamp EM on the references, paint the queries, score.

The headline demonstration (CLAUDE.md §9): sim -> fit -> paint -> score against the
census truth. With ``infer=True`` the painting runs on a tsinfer-inferred ARG (the
§9 binding constraint: does tree-native LAI survive tree-inference error?), else on
the true ARG.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**T_admix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [30.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Admixture time in generations.

<code>[**n_admix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [6]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of admixed-query and per-source-reference individuals.

<code>[**n_ref**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [6]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of admixed-query and per-source-reference individuals.

<code>[**sequence_length**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [200000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters (sequence length, recombination rate, effective size, source-split time, admixture fraction of source A).

<code>[**recombination_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [200000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters (sequence length, recombination rate, effective size, source-split time, admixture fraction of source A).

<code>[**Ne**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [200000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters (sequence length, recombination rate, effective size, source-split time, admixture fraction of source A).

<code>[**T_split**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [200000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters (sequence length, recombination rate, effective size, source-split time, admixture fraction of source A).

<code>[**f_A**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [200000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters (sequence length, recombination rate, effective size, source-split time, admixture fraction of source A).

<code>[**seed**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Random seed.

<code>[**max_iter**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [8]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Maximum EM iterations.

<code>[**Q0**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Initial generator (defaults to a symmetric ``1e-3`` 2-state generator).

<code>[**infer**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [False]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   If True paint on a tsinfer-inferred ARG; else on the true ARG.

<code>[**mutation_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [5e-08]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Mutation rate used to overlay sites before tsinfer (only when ``infer=True``).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Includes ``accuracy``, ``balanced_accuracy``, ``confidence``, calibration ``reliability``, flicker summaries (``mean_flicker``, ``mean_flicker_off_true``, ``mean_flip_rate``), ``boundary_error``, fitted ``Q``/``pi``, ``timings``, and the raw ``tracks``/``truth_states`` (plus ``ts`` and ``work_ts``) for further analysis.
